title: Validate And Close First Tech Debt Tranche
summary: Runs the final repo gate, records removed debt and bounded deferrals, and closes the first tech-debt tranche cleanly.
scope_items: Run the full repo validation and test gate on the final debt-reduction tree.
Capture the debt removed, the remaining residue, and the next recommended cleanup tranche before closeout.
done_when_items: The full repo gate passes on the final first-tranche debt-reduction tree.
The initiative closes with a clear summary of removed debt and explicit retained residue.
